title: Functions, Scope, and Callable Contracts · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: An adult education facilitator supporting offline learners. Learners need a fast local journal with validation, search, summaries, and recoverable errors. Planned artifact: Deliver Command-Line Learning Field Journal with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain how source, the interpreter, objects, and standard streams participate when a Python program runs.
Choose search, split, join, strip, replace, case, and predicate methods from the actual text contract.
Use if, elif, else, conditional expressions, and guard clauses to express exclusive and early-exit decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
